# MillionVerifier — Pricing

## Verification Credits (One-Time, Prepaid, Never Expire)

| Email Volume | Price | Cost per Email |
|--------------|-------|-----------------|
| 2,000 | $4.90 | $0.00245 |
| 10,000 | $37 | $0.0037 |
| 50,000 | $89 | $0.00178 |
| 100,000 | $149 | $0.00149 |
| 500,000 | $299 | $0.000598 |
| 1,000,000 | $449 | $0.000449 |
| 50,000,000 | $8,499 | $0.00017 |

## Automated EverClean (Monthly Subscription)

| Volume | Price per Month |
|--------|-----------------|
| Up to 10,000/day | $15/mo |
| Higher volumes | Custom pricing |

## Key Benefits

- Only charged for "decisive" results (valid/invalid); catch-all and unknown emails are free
- "Million Ever Green" promotion: Get 1M free credits for every 5M purchased
- 100% money-back guarantee if hard bounce rate exceeds 4%

## Credit / Usage Model

- 1 credit = 1 email address verified
- Bulk list upload (CSV) or real-time API verification
- Credits from one-time purchases do not expire
- Result categories: Good, Risky, Bad — "Good" emails are safe to send; "Risky" requires judgment

## TCO Notes

- Among the lowest cost-per-verification services on the market (~$0.00019–$0.00025 per email at scale)
- One-time credit packs are ideal for batch list cleaning before campaign launch; API subscription for ongoing pipeline use
- Should be used as a final step before sending — after email finding (Proxycurl/Prospeo) and before importing to Instantly/Saleshandy
- Accuracy is generally rated well by independent testers; benchmark against ZeroBounce or NeverBounce if deliverability is critical
